description_long: This is a compact, modern bullpup-style rifle with a distinctive two-tone color scheme of light gray and black, accented by a bold orange stripe running along the side. The rifle features a prominent integrated carrying handle with iron sights mounted on top, and a short, squared-off barrel with a visible muzzle brake. The body is streamlined, with a large trigger guard and ergonomic thumbhole grip, typical of bullpup designs, allowing for a shorter overall length while maintaining a full-length barrel. Japanese katakana characters are printed on the side, adding a unique visual element. The magazine is integrated into the rear section of the rifle, consistent with the bullpup configuration, and the overall design suggests a lightweight, tactical firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, bullpup-style rifle with a light gray and black body, orange accent stripe, and Japanese katakana markings. Features include an integrated carrying handle, iron sights, and a short barrel with a muzzle brake.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle brake, barrel opening, and the alignment of the iron sights on the carrying handle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, the orange accent stripe, Japanese katakana text, and the ergonomic grip and trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, the rear sight, and the compact bullpup configuration with the magazine area at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the mirrored design, orange stripe, and additional Japanese katakana text, as well as the overall streamlined profile.
